source_quote: Pain severity 2-3 (n;%) Day 1: PcV 5 (5%) vs no PcV 22 (28%), p<0.001. n=92 PcV, n=87 no PcV.

outcome: Microbiological UTI: positive culture without known symptoms
source_quote: Time to first urine culture with any organism >100,000 cfu/ml: Overall Control N=17 N1=12, 1 capsule N=20 N1=13, 2 capsules N=19 N1=14. Rate ratio 1 capsule vs control 1.11 (95% CI 0.47-2.66), 2 capsules vs control 0.92 (95% CI 0.39-2.17).
Informed Choice, N (%): Intervention 48 (41%) vs Control 31 (23%), p=0.003. At 1 month, N=120 intervention, N=133 control.

outcome: Informed values-choice congruence - old vs new studies
source_quote: No subgroup analysis by old vs new studies found in the paper. Only overall informed choice data reported at 1 month and 6 months.

outcome: Informed values-chose congruence - using non-MMIC measures
source_quote: No subgroup analysis using non-MMIC measures found in the paper. The paper uses a single informed choice measure from Korfage et al. 2013.
